tasks.title: Zuora Discovery — Strategic Assessment for Revaly
tasks.summary: Full Zuora platform analysis: $1.7B company (taken private by Silver Lake 2025), 600+ enterprise subscription clients, native dunning is checkbox not core. Revaly already integrates with Zuora. Key finding: Zuora's customer base is Revaly's ideal TAM. Recommended as channel partnership play, not competitive defense. Next steps: identify Zuora partnership owner, quantify merchant opportunity, align Casey on channel motion.
tasks.source: Asana task 'Darryl to do Zuora Discovery' + web research

tasks.title: Maor Amar / SAFE Investor Situation Brief
tasks.summary: Prep for Monday follow-up. Maor = Managing Partner at Impression Ventures (board member, $300K SAFE in Revaly). Impression now on Fund IV ($64M CAD). SAFE likely converts in Q3 raise — Laurent needs to model conversion at various valuations. Talking points prepared. Risk assessment: low-medium depending on SAFE terms. Positive: Impression may want follow-on investment.
tasks.source: iMessage monitor flag (Mar 6) + web research + memory

tasks.title: End-of-Week Task Audit — March 2-7 Rollover Analysis
tasks.summary: 2/15 tasks completed this week (13%). 13 rolling over. Critical items: Montreal mortgage (25 days), F1 invites (2+ weeks overdue), Maor SAFE follow-up. Elder school prep urgency upgraded to HIGH (happening next week). Recommended: block 90 min Monday AM for quick-win task clearing.

lastSummary: 3 tasks completed overnight: (1) Zuora Discovery — full platform analysis, Revaly already integrates, 600+ enterprise clients = ideal channel partnership target, (2) Maor Amar SAFE investor brief for Monday — SAFE conversion modeling needed from Laurent pre-Q3 raise, (3) Week-ending task audit — 2/15 completed, 13 rolling over, critical deadlines flagged.
